threads.name: Opening / first weeks
threads.note: Arrival, the workplace-opening arc, settling in, the first callbacks.

threads.name: Jake romance
threads.note: Met at the coffee shop -> dating -> intimacy -> domesticity -> she-seeks.

threads.name: Marcus affair
threads.note: Workplace tension -> affair -> escalation -> leverage cost -> cooling.

threads.name: Theo / campus
threads.note: Campus route: orientation -> Theo -> morning-after -> public visibility.

threads.name: Desire / looping adult
threads.note: The recurring need-state: release valves and ambushes.

threads.name: Ambient life
threads.note: Texture scenes not owned by a single arc. Reassign to a thread as arcs grow.
